title: Craftable Full Brightness Light│可合成全亮度光源方塊
description: Added Light recipe.│添加了光源方塊配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Arrange the stained glass panes in the shape of a light bulb to craft light. Different colors will craft different levels of light.│將染色玻璃板排成燈泡形狀即可合成光，不同的顏色會合成出不同等級的光。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
